{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Ayana's fingernails
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Ayana]] has six-inch fingernails made of solid black iron.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
